items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of a simulated persona scenario involving IDOR on booking IDs. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces from the simulation, nor does it confirm whether the scenario behavior was supported or resulted in a failure report. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive assessment regarding the validation of the scenario.
